_comment: Ancient God Land Level 2 — Bridge of No Return + Restriction Mountain. Canon (CANON_RI_COMPLETE_WORLD.md L48-49): The second level of Tu Si's corpse realm. Contains the Bridge of No Return (a trial-bridge) and Restriction Mountain (禁制山, a trial-mountain covered in ancient restrictions). Wang Lin inherited Tu Si's knowledge here. More structured than Level 1 — the ancient restrictions impose order on the chaos. World-law tier: medium-high. Prime Directive: the Bridge and Mountain are objective structures within Tu Si's body — the restrictions are physical formations embedded in the corpse tissue, not perception effects.
